mapper.insert: insert into favorites_table( id, userId, name, createTime ) value ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from favorites_table where id = #{id} and userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into favorites_invitation_table( favoritesId, invitationId, userId, createTime ) values ( #{favoritesId}, #{invitationId}, #{userId}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from favorites_invitation_table where favoritesId = #{favoritesId} and userId = #{currentUserId}
mapper.select:
select rc_personal.favorites_table.id, rc_personal.favorites_table.`name`, rc_personal.favorites_table.createTime, (select count(*) from rc_personal.favorites_invitation_table where rc_personal.favorites_table.id = rc_personal.favorites_invitation_table.favoritesId ) as num from rc_personal.favorites_table
where rc_personal.favorites_table.userId = #{currentUserId}
